title: NE12 8EW, Greggs PLC: environmental permit issued - EPR/GP3532PR/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Greggs PLC   Installation name: Greggs Balliol Park Longbenton   Permit number: EPR/GP3532PR   "
